name: Lytics
description: Lytics — Customer data platform with ML-powered audience scoring and activation for marketing campaigns.

seo.title: Lytics — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Lytics: Lytics — Customer data platform with ML-powered audience scoring and activation for marketing campaigns.

when_to_use: ML audience scoring for marketing campaign optimization
CDP activation to paid media via lookalike audiences
Behavioral affinity modeling for content personalization
Customer churn propensity scoring for retention campaigns
Real-time segment activation across marketing channels

pros: Integrates with major ad platforms and DSPs
Reasonable fit for mid-market marketing teams
Content affinity modeling is genuinely useful
cons: Not a product analytics platform despite category
ML outputs can feel like a black box
review.verdict: Established mid-market CDP with solid ML; facing real headwinds from composable alternatives like Hightouch.
review.best_for: Mid-market marketing teams wanting packaged CDP with ML audience scoring.
review.not_for: Product analytics use cases or teams standardizing on warehouse-native composable stacks.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
